zh.New Bedford, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托劍橋大學默里 貝德福德
zh.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯
zh.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利
zh.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Unite: 美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托達特姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: Hannah於大約1667年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利。她於大約1691年與William Soule在美國麻薩諸塞州結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1729年4月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hannah于大约1667年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利。她于大约1691年与William Soule在美国马萨诸塞州结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1729年4月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: Hannah was born about 1667, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. She married William Soule about 1691, in Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 April 1729, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Hannah est née environ 1667, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé William Soule environ 1691, à Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 avril 1729, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hannah wurde um 1667 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat um 1691 in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten William Soule geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. April 1729 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Hannah è nata il circa 1667 nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Lei sposato William Soule circa 1691, nel Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1729, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannahは約1667年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーで生まれた。約1691年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州でWilliam Souleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1729年4月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで63歳で死去した。

ko.New Bedford, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 뉴 베드퍼드
ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah(은)는 대략 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1691년 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 William Soule(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1729년 4월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hannah nasceu aproximadamente 1667, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com William Soule aproximadamente 1691, em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de abril de 1729, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hannah родилась около 1667 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Soule около 1691 г. в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 апреля 1729 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con William Soule aproximadamente 1691, en Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1729, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
